text: Hey, what can I help you with?

I want to teach you our creative QA process. When a new order comes in, log into our CRM portal, pull the order details and line items, download the creative files, check them against our spec sheet, then post the results back to the order.
Great, I watched the recording and understand the workflow. Here's the plan:
steps: Navigate to Order and verify details
Download creative files for each line item
Analyze creative dimensions, format, and file size
Post results back to each line item

text: First, I'll log into the CRM portal and navigate to the order page...
